content.json:
## DSC v3 Fleet — compliance dashboard

Last 30 days of runs ingested by the DSC v3 reporting Function. Filter by group / config below.

content.query:
DscV3RunSummary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Group in ({Group}) or '*' in ({Group})
| where Config in ({Config}) or '*' in ({Config})
| summarize Servers=dcount(Host), Runs=count(), Successful=countif(Success==true), Drifted=sumif(DriftedCount, DriftedCount>0)
| extend SuccessPct = round(100.0*Successful/Runs, 1)

DscV3RunSummary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Group in ({Group}) or '*' in ({Group})
| where Config in ({Config}) or '*' in ({Config})
| summarize Total=count(), Drifted=sumif(1, DriftedCount>0), Failed=countif(Success==false) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Run outcomes over time

content.query:
DscV3RunSummary_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Group in ({Group}) or '*' in ({Group})
| where Config in ({Config}) or '*' in ({Config})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Host, Config
| summarize Configs=count(), Drifted=countif(DriftedCount>0), Failed=countif(Success==false) by Host
| order by Drifted desc, Failed desc, Host asc
content.title: Per-server compliance (latest run per config)

content.query:
DscV3Run_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Group in ({Group}) or '*' in ({Group})
| where Config in ({Config}) or '*' in ({Config})
| where Drifted == true
| summarize Servers=dcount(Host), Drifts=count() by ResourceType, ResourceName
| order by Drifts desc
content.title: Most-drifted resources

content.query:
DscV3Run_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Error != ''
| project TimeGenerated, Host, Group, Config, ResourceType, ResourceName, Error
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: Recent errors
